query:
UPDATE fiskeridir_vessels v
SET
    gear_group_ids = (
        SELECT
            ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT g)
        FROM
            UNNEST($1::INT[] || v.gear_group_ids) AS t (g)
    ),
    species_group_ids = (
        SELECT
            ARRAY_AGG(DISTINCT s)
        FROM
            UNNEST($2::INT[] || v.species_group_ids) AS t (s)
    )
WHERE
    v.fiskeridir_vessel_id = $3
